query: SELECT p.id, p.companyName, p.primaryContactEmail, p.primaryContactName, p.status, u.id as userId, u.email as userEmail, u.role as userRole FROM partners p LEFT JOIN users u ON u.partnerId = p.id ORDER BY p.id LIMIT 30;
